title: Where Shadows Whisper

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I cried out in the stillness of the night,
My soul, a cavern echoing in pain,
The skies held no answer, only silent stars,
And I searched for You in the shadows again.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Was it not You who split the seas apart?
Who lit the skies with fire in the deep?
Yet now my voice seems lost in empty winds,
A heart longing for a promise to keep.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In the midnight waters, where hope seems thin,
I recall Your wonders, the world within.
Though my cries may falter, Your echoes ring,
Through the breaking waves, I will sing, I will sing.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The earth beneath me trembles in its ache,
The rivers shudder, yearning for Your hand,
The heavens once resounded with Your name,
But now their whispers fade across the land.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Was it not You who split the seas apart?
Who lit the skies with fire in the deep?
Yet now my voice seems lost in empty winds,
A heart longing for a promise to keep.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In the midnight waters, where hope seems thin,
I recall Your wonders, the world within.
Though my cries may falter, Your echoes ring,
Through the breaking waves, I will sing, I will sing.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Where shadows whisper, I hear Your name,
Through every silence, You're still the same.
Even in grief, I will call Your truth,
Through the breaking waves, I will sing to You.

epigraph: I call to remembrance my song in the night
styleNote: Slow-Building Instrumentation · Full Band Enters · Repeated With Heightened Intensity
